_readme: RULES-1-C GPU-arm harness manifest (poc/rules-1/rules1_runner.py + poc/rules-1/modal/modal_rules1.py) -- ENTITY-form host surface; DRAFT registry/experiments/rules-1-c.json supersedes rules-1-b (frozen 2b81375e..., host-validity pilot floor failure).
Every pin below is verified fail-closed (ERR_PIN / ERR_CERT_PRECONDITION) before any cell runs, mock included.

pins.model_revisions provenance: registry/experiments/nsk1.json is DRAFT and carries NO resolved revision shas (R1/R2 placeholders only); the FROZEN carriers of the R1/R3 Instruct revisions are registry/experiments/f2b-replicate.json and f2b-transfer.json pins.model_revisions (both FROZEN; same host family the nsk1 G2 calibration exercised). The coordinator's ops amendment should cite that chain when filling the rules-1 record's PINNED-AT-INPUTS model_revisions.

design_constants_from_frozen_record.arms_note: The coordinator-scoped host-lift arms (A1/A3/A5/A7) plus c1 shuffled-rules — the load-bearing structure control the frozen verdict_rules require for PASS (s1) and the design marks as the one control NOT to cut. A2/A4/c2/c4/c6 cells are NOT in this runner's default plan; c5 is phase-2 by design (MD-7).

pins._pin_notes: corpus hashes verbatim from the FROZEN record pins.corpus_hashes (kot-corpus-hash/1); twin-engine + certificate-result verbatim from pins.artifact_hashes; f2bt runner pinned so the A3 loop's reused bytes (HFLM forced-choice scorer, seeded retry sampler SEED_BASE 20260710, CellGuard) are byte-identical to the f2b-transfer FULL-run harness; poc/f2b + poc/f2b-transfer + poc/deconf-b trees are NOT modified by this build (new module only).

model_revisions.dtype: fp32 (frozen runner_constraints.hardware: 'single A10G (Modal), fp32, greedy'; the reused f2bt HFLM defaults to fp16, so Rules1HFLM overrides ONLY the load dtype and inherits the scorer/sampler unchanged)

prompt_frames.task_prefix:
Read the family facts, then answer the question with exactly one name.

Facts:
prompt_frames.task_prefix_render: Read the verified derivation, then answer the question with exactly one name.
prompt_frames.una_line: - All named people are distinct individuals.
prompt_frames.derived_prefix: Verified derivations from a deterministic rules engine (each with its proof):
prompt_frames.feedback_prefix: Verifier feedback on earlier answers (each rejection is licensed by a proof from the stated facts):
prompt_frames.padding_sentence: This line is neutral padding text with no information about the family.
prompt_frames.frames_note: single shared affordance for every arm (nsk1/f2b discipline); arms differ ONLY in the derived/feedback blocks and padding (PROPOSED-ASM-1127 token matching: A1/A5 pad to the A2-shaped injection token count computed per item with the arm's own tokenizer). RULES-1-C FIX (2026-07-12, after the rules-1-b host-validity pilot FAILED the frozen A5 floor at 0/24 on the fixed relation-word frame): the host surface is the ENTITY form (nsk1 g2b form 2) -- question 'Who is the <gold_rel> of <base>?', per-item 2-option forced choice over the non-base lexicon surfaces (bridge + chain-top; anti-echo structural, chance 0.5 DISCLOSED), answer = chain-top NAME (third-party CLUTRR proof_state gold). ROOT CAUSE of the rules-1-b floor failure (form mis-attribution): the 0.7912 A5 premise is the nsk1 ENTITY-form bprime datum (n=958); the relation-word form is recorded 'dead-at-floor at every tested host' in the nsk1-g2d assessment (1.7B 0.00-0.10), and 8 frame variants measured 2026-07-12 on the pinned R3 (A10G fp32; incl. the exact nsk1 chat+generation channel and story content) never put the gold relation word top-1, while the entity form on the SAME stated-facts world with the SAME f2bt scorer scored 11/12. The rules-1-b fixes are preserved in entity form: the answer cue is the direction-explicit infill 'the {rel} of {a_name} is' and no option enumeration appears anywhere in the prompt (the closed option set is enforced by the per-option logprob scorer). RULES-1-C A7 RENDER-ONLY (measured on the pinned R1 @ A10G fp32, n=12, 2026-07-12): A7's prompt is task_prefix_render + the BARE derived fact + question + cue, with NO stated-facts block and NO proof prose -- facts+proof scored 4/12 and facts+bare 3/12 (bridge-frequency capture at the 135M, the g2d pathology), render-only+proof 7/12, render-only+bare 12/12; the proof stays in the engine payload and the run-record ledger.

shuffle.algorithm: Sattolo cyclic derangement over the six kinship property-record subject URNs {mother, father, parent, grandparent, grandfather, grandmother}: each axiom record's constraint body is re-hung on a different property subject (identical record count, constraint shapes and token cost; content decoupled). Map + sha recorded in shuffle-map-rules1.json (PROPOSED-ASM-1129).

mock.note: SYNTHETIC mechanics-only stub LM (no torch); every number is labelled MOCK and never a measurement. The engine (twin), closures, proofs, feedback rendering, gold-leak guard, derangement, row emitter and analysis contract are the REAL code paths.

planning.note: dry-plan ESTIMATES only — never emitted as measurements; constants carried from poc/f2b-transfer/inputs/f2bt-manifest.json planning
planning.overhead_factor_note: rules-1-b true-up (PROPOSED-ASM-1638): the executed 20260712-070956 campaign measured 4.59 h wall for an ALL-retries run (A3/c1 attempts=5 everywhere) vs 4.28 h planned worst-case compute — measured overhead ~1.07x; 1.5 keeps a conservative margin. The prior 2.0 carried from f2bt planning put the marginal expected-hours check at 5.96/6.00 h, which the +~6-token/item direction-explicit cue flipped OVER despite the measured run finishing well inside every cap.
